case_title: IN RE: MAX BENJAMIN HOWARD ET AL

docket_entries.description: NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2019, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY AS SCHEDULED THIS DAY FOR OSC HEARING FOR CHANGE OF NAME. DEPT. 514. PETITIONER WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER. PROOF OF PUBLICATION IN THE FILE. NO OBJECTIONS TO THE PROPOSED CHANGE OF NAME WERE MADE AT THE HEARING. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE ALLEGATIONS IN THE PETITION ARE TRUE, CORRECT AND SUFFICIENT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. DECREE CHANGING NAME WAS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: GAIL DEKERON. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED.
PROOF OF PUBLICATION (SAN FRANCISCO DAILY JOURNAL) OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER HOWARD, CHARLES HEARING SET FOR OCT-10-2019 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE, 1 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PETITIONER HOWARD, CHARLES
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME, RESIDENCY VERIFIED, FILED BY PETITIONER HOWARD, CHARLES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECREE CHANGING NAME GRANTED. NEW NAMES: MAX BENJAMIN BODDEN-HOWARD OLIVER NICHOLAS BODDEN-HOWARD FILED BY PETITIONER HOWARD, CHARLES
COPYING FEES (3 PAGE, 3 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PETITIONER HOWARD, CHARLES
